title: G.E.E.K. Radio 305
about_body:
G.E.E.K. Radio 305 is the flagship audio broadcast of the IIIGLOBE network — a curated soundscape for the gifted, the educated, the empowered. Broadcasting culture, conversation, and coded frequency out of Miami, FL.

Expect deep dives into tech, innovation, Hip-Hop culture, entrepreneurship, and the stories that mainstream radio won't tell. Every episode is a transmission built to elevate.

items.name: The Frequency
items.description: Weekly deep-dive into culture, technology, and the intersection of creativity and code.

items.name: King's Table
items.description: Roundtable conversations with innovators, entrepreneurs, and builders shaping the future.

items.name: 305 Sessions
items.description: Live sets, interviews, and exclusive content direct from Miami's creative underground.
